name: WestRock Company
description: Smurfit Westrock is a global leader in sustainable paper and packaging solutions, formed through the merger of WestRock and Smurfit Kappa in July 2024. Headquartered in Ireland, the company operates in 40 countries with over 500 production facilities and 100,000 team members worldwide. As a trusted partner to businesses across various industries, Smurfit Westrock leverages advanced materials science, packaging design, and manufacturing expertise to create efficient, scalable, and fiber-based packaging solutions that address complex global challenges while prioritizing sustainability and innovation.
